prompts.prompt: Create an image in vaporwave aesthetic: retro 80s style with a distinctive grid pattern, pink and teal color palette evoking a sunset, low-poly geometric elements, and a dreamy nostalgic mood. The scene should feel like classic vaporwave art with sharp contrasts and neon accents. Render in 4k with high detail and crisp edges. Ideal for posters, wallpapers, or social media backgrounds. --ar 16:9
prompts.title: Vaporwave Dreams
prompts.description: 80s aesthetic with neon colors and retro grids. Great for posters and backgrounds.

prompts.prompt: Create a photorealistic portrait of a woman with a cinematic film look. Use golden hour lighting with warm, soft sunlight creating gentle shadows and a glowing rim light. Simulate an 85mm lens at f/1.8 for beautiful shallow depth of field and soft bokeh. Capture detailed, natural skin texture with subtle pores and realistic lighting. The mood should be professional yet intimate, suitable for editorial or high-end portrait photography. Avoid any artificial or plastic look. --v 6.0
prompts.title: Cinematic Portrait
prompts.description: Hyper-realistic portrait with golden hour lighting and shallow depth of field.

prompts.prompt: Generate a cyberpunk cityscape at night: sprawling metropolis with towering skyscrapers, streets soaked with rain reflecting neon signs in pink, blue, and purple. Include holographic advertisements and giant screens, flickering lights, and a blade runner inspired aesthetic. Atmosphere should feel high-tech but gritty, with fog or mist, and a sense of urban density. Style should be cinematic and detailed, 8k quality, with strong mood and contrast. --ar 16:9
prompts.title: Cyberpunk Cityscape
prompts.description: Neon-lit streets, rain, high-tech low-life mood. Blade Runner style.

prompts.prompt: Design a minimalist logo: use single continuous line art or simple geometric shapes, strictly monochrome (black on white or vice versa), clean vector style with no gradients or 3D effects. The logo should be scalable, memorable, and suitable for professional branding. Keep the design uncluttered and modern. White or light background. Suitable for a company or product logo. --v 6
prompts.title: Minimalist Logo
prompts.description: Clean single-line or geometric logo, monochrome, vector style. Ideal for branding.

prompts.prompt: Create a watercolor painting of a peaceful landscape: soft, visible brush strokes in a traditional watercolor style, pastel colors including soft blues, greens, and warm earth tones. The scene should feature mountains in the distance and a calm lake or river in the foreground. The paper texture should be subtly visible. Mood should be serene and artistic, avoiding any digital or photorealistic look. Maintain a painterly, soft quality throughout. --ar 3:2
prompts.title: Watercolor Landscape
prompts.description: Soft watercolor painting of a peaceful landscape with pastel colors and brush texture.

prompts.prompt: Professional product photography shot: a perfume bottle or luxury product placed on a reflective surface such as glass or acrylic, with studio lighting that creates soft shadows and elegant highlights. The lighting should be controlled and flattering, with a luxury brand aesthetic. Background can be neutral or dark. Render in 8k with commercial quality, sharp details, and a high-end advertising look. Avoid harsh shadows or cluttered composition. --ar 4:5
prompts.title: Product Shot Studio
prompts.description: Professional product photography with studio lighting and reflective surfaces.

prompts.prompt: Create fantasy character concept art: a full body turn-around sheet showing the same character from front, side, and back views in a consistent dark fantasy style. The character should wear detailed armor and a cloak with intricate costume design. Include clear costume and armor details, consistent proportions across all views, and a character sheet layout suitable for game or illustration reference. Style should be high-detail concept art with coherent lighting and color palette. --v 6
prompts.title: Fantasy Character Sheet
prompts.description: Full-body character concept art and turn-around sheet in dark fantasy style.

prompts.prompt: Render a cozy living room interior in photorealistic style: warm ambient lighting combined with natural light coming through a window, Scandinavian or modern minimalist design with plants, soft textiles, and wooden or light-colored furniture. The mood should feel inviting and lived-in, not sterile or cold. Include subtle details like books, cushions, and greenery. Avoid clutter; keep the space clean and harmonious. Suitable for interior design or lifestyle imagery. --ar 16:9
prompts.title: Cozy Interior
prompts.description: Warm Scandinavian-style living room with plants and natural light. Photorealistic.

prompts.prompt: Draw an anime style portrait: soft lighting on the face, highly detailed and expressive eyes with characteristic anime styling, flowing hair with natural movement and shine. Place the character against a background of cherry blossoms or soft pink petals. The illustration should be high quality anime with clean linework, balanced colors, and a polished look. Avoid realistic or 3D render style; keep it clearly 2D anime illustration. --ar 2:3
prompts.title: Anime Portrait
prompts.description: Anime-style portrait with soft lighting, detailed eyes, and cherry blossom background.

prompts.prompt: Design an Instagram post: bold typography as the main visual element, gradient background in modern colors (e.g. purple to blue or coral to yellow), use a clean modern sans-serif font. The layout should have a clear hierarchy and feel like a call-to-action or promotional post. Optimize for 1080x1080 square format. Keep text readable and the overall look professional and on-brand for social media marketing. Avoid busy or low-contrast design. --ar 1:1
prompts.title: Social Media Post
prompts.description: Bold typography and gradient design for Instagram. Modern, 1:1 aspect ratio.

prompts.prompt: Create an isometric room illustration: a single room (cozy bedroom, cafe, or similar) drawn in isometric perspective with tiny details such as furniture, decorations, plants, and objects. Warm, inviting lighting that gives a game-asset or indie game aesthetic. The style should be consistent with clean lines and a cohesive color palette. Pay attention to correct isometric angles and consistent lighting across the scene. Render in 4k with a polished, detailed look. --ar 1:1
prompts.title: Isometric Room
prompts.description: Isometric illustration of a cozy room or cafe. Game-asset style with tiny details.

prompts.prompt: Create a street photography style image: a candid moment in an urban setting, shot with a Leica-like aesthetic. Use high contrast black and white with visible film grain. Simulate 35mm film photography with natural composition, decisive moment feel, and documentary quality. The image should feel unposed and authentic. Avoid color, overly posed subjects, or a digital oversharpened look. Mood should be timeless and evocative. --ar 2:3
prompts.title: Street Photography
prompts.description: Candid urban moment, film grain, high contrast black and white. Leica style.

prompts.prompt: Generate a cinematic drone shot: aerial footage flying over misty mountains at sunrise. The camera should move smoothly and steadily, with a film-like quality. Include subtle film grain and anamorphic lens flare for a cinematic feel. The landscape should be dramatic with layers of mountains, mist or low clouds, and warm sunrise light. Resolution 4K, motion should be fluid and professional, suitable for documentary or opening sequence. Avoid shaky movement or artificial-looking effects.
prompts.title: Cinematic Drone Shot
prompts.description: Aerial footage over misty mountains at sunrise. Smooth, film-like motion.

prompts.prompt: Upscale this video to 4K: enhance detail and sharpness throughout the frame while reducing noise and compression artifacts. Preserve the original film grain texture and color grade so the look and mood stay consistent. Do not over-sharpen or introduce new artifacts. The goal is a cleaner, higher-resolution version that still feels like the original. Output in 4K; keep aspect ratio as original or standard 16:9 as appropriate.
prompts.title: AI Upscale Instructions
prompts.description: Enhance resolution and detail while preserving film grain and color grade.

prompts.prompt: Create a time lapse: dramatic clouds moving over a city skyline at golden hour. The sky should show visible motion of clouds with smooth transition and consistent golden-hour lighting. Frame rate 24fps for a cinematic feel. The city can be silhouetted or partially visible. Avoid jerky motion or sudden changes in lighting; keep the transition smooth and natural. Quality 4K, suitable for nature or urban time lapse sequences.
prompts.title: Timelapse Sky
prompts.description: Dramatic clouds over city skyline at golden hour. 24fps, smooth transition.

prompts.prompt: Create a smooth product reveal: a smartphone or watch slowly rotating on a dark background. Use soft key light to highlight the product with gentle reflections. The motion should be smooth and continuous, 4K resolution at 60fps for a premium commercial look. The overall feel should be high-end advertising: clean, professional, no shake or amateur lighting. Suitable for product launch or e-commerce video.
prompts.title: Product Reveal
prompts.description: Smooth rotating product shot on dark background. Commercial, 4K.

prompts.prompt: Apply a slow motion effect to this clip: convert from high frame rate (e.g. 120fps) to 24fps for a cinematic slow motion look. Preserve smooth motion blur so movement feels natural and fluid. Emphasize the key moment or action in the scene. The result should feel cinematic and intentional, not choppy or artificially interpolated. Keep aspect ratio 16:9 and maintain consistent exposure and color.
prompts.title: Slow Motion Effect
prompts.description: Apply slow motion, smooth motion blur. Cinematic emphasis on key moment.

prompts.prompt: Generate a talking head vlog style clip: a person speaking directly to camera with a natural, engaging expression. Use soft, flattering lighting and shallow depth of field so the background is slightly blurred. The feel should be authentic vlog or webinar style: 1080p at 24fps, natural skin tones, and direct eye contact with the viewer. Avoid stiff delivery, over-lit flat lighting, or an obvious green screen look. The speaker should feel present and conversational.
prompts.title: Talking Head Vlog
prompts.description: Person speaking to camera, natural expression, soft lighting. Vlog style.

prompts.prompt: Create a first-person walk through a forest path: the camera moves forward at a walking pace with gentle, natural movement. Show dappled sunlight through the leaves, greenery on both sides, and a peaceful atmosphere. The mood should be immersive and calming, as if the viewer is taking a quiet walk in nature. Quality 4K. Avoid fast movement, urban elements, or night scenes; keep it daytime and serene.
prompts.title: Nature Walk
prompts.description: First-person walk through forest path, dappled sunlight. Peaceful, immersive.

prompts.prompt: Create a 15-second video ad from text: include a clear product shot, text overlay with the brand name and key message, and upbeat motion or cuts that keep energy high. End with a clear call-to-action (e.g. Shop now, Learn more, Subscribe). Resolution 1080p. The ad should be punchy and short-form friendly (e.g. for social or pre-roll). Avoid long static shots or missing CTA; keep the message clear and the pacing dynamic.
prompts.title: Text-to-Video Ad
prompts.description: Short 15-second ad with product shot, text overlay, and call-to-action.

prompts.prompt: Generate a VFX shot: realistic smoke and fire simulation in slow motion. Use a dark background so the smoke and flames are clearly visible. Lighting should be cinematic with the fire as the main light source. The simulation should look physically plausible and detailed, 4K quality. Style should be realistic VFX for film or high-end commercial use. Avoid cartoon-like or low-resolution, flat-looking effects.
prompts.title: VFX Smoke & Fire
prompts.description: Realistic smoke and fire simulation, slow motion. Cinematic VFX.

prompts.prompt: Explain prompt engineering in simple terms for a beginner. Cover: (1) What prompt engineering is and why it matters for getting better results from AI image generators and chatbots. (2) The difference between vague prompts and specific, well-structured prompts. (3) Give three concrete examples of good vs bad prompts for image generation, with a short explanation of why each good prompt works better (e.g. style, composition, quality terms). Keep the tone educational and clear. Format so a reader can quickly apply the tips. Aim for concise, actionable advice.
prompts.title: Prompt Engineering Basics
prompts.description: Learn what prompt engineering is and see examples of good vs bad prompts.

prompts.prompt: Summarize the latest developments in multimodal AI in 2025. Include: (1) Vision: key models and capabilities (e.g. image understanding, OCR, visual QA). (2) Audio: speech, music, and sound generation or recognition. (3) Video: text-to-video, editing, and generation tools. For each modality, mention at least one leading model or product and one practical use case. Keep the style informative and structured with clear headings. Prefer cited or verifiable information and note if something is emerging or not yet widely available.
prompts.title: Multimodal AI 2025
prompts.description: Latest developments in vision, audio, and video AI. Key models and use cases.

prompts.prompt: List the most useful Midjourney parameters with short explanations and example values. Include: --ar (aspect ratio), --v (version), --style, --chaos, --stylize, --quality, --no (negative prompt), and any other commonly used parameters. For each parameter, give a one-line explanation and 1–2 example values (e.g. --ar 16:9, --chaos 25). Format as a quick reference that is easy to scan and copy-paste. Style should be tutorial/reference: clear and practical for someone learning Midjourney.
prompts.title: Midjourney Parameters
prompts.description: Quick reference for --ar, --v, --style, --chaos and other Midjourney parameters.

prompts.prompt: Explain what negative prompts are in AI image generation. Cover: (1) Definition and purpose: how they tell the model what to avoid. (2) When to use them: typical situations (e.g. avoiding blur, distortion, wrong style). (3) Common keywords and phrases (e.g. blurry, distorted, oversaturated, text, extra limbs) with brief explanations. (4) How negative prompts differ across tools: Midjourney (--no), Stable Diffusion (negative prompt field), and DALL·E (if applicable). Include practical examples so a user can apply this in their workflow. Style: educational and comparative.
prompts.title: Negative Prompts Guide
prompts.description: When and how to use negative prompts. Compare Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, DALL·E.

prompts.prompt: Outline a simple step-by-step workflow for creating a short AI-generated video from script or idea to final clip. Include: (1) Defining the idea and writing a short script or scene description. (2) Choosing tools (e.g. Runway, Pika, Sora, or similar) and when to use each. (3) Generating or sourcing initial clips. (4) Best practices for consistency: style, character, lighting, and pacing. (5) Editing and exporting the final clip. Format as actionable steps with clear headings. Style: step-by-step workflow that a beginner can follow.
prompts.title: Video AI Workflow
prompts.description: Simple workflow from idea to final AI-generated video. Tools and best practices.

prompts.prompt: Summarize current debates on AI ethics in 2025. Cover: (1) Deepfakes and misinformation: risks and detection. (2) Copyright and training data: lawsuits, opt-outs, and licensing. (3) Labor impact: effects on creative and knowledge work. (4) Transparency and explainability: how AI decisions are communicated. Include at least one regulatory or industry initiative (e.g. EU AI Act, voluntary commitments, or standards). Present multiple perspectives where relevant. Style: balanced and factual; prefer cited or attributable claims where possible.
prompts.title: AI Ethics 2025
prompts.description: Current debates on deepfakes, copyright, labor, and transparency. Regulation overview.

prompts.prompt: Write a short comparison guide for choosing an AI image tool. Compare Midjourney, DALL·E 3, Leonardo, and Stable Diffusion. For each tool include: best suited for (e.g. beginners vs advanced), typical cost or pricing model, main strengths (e.g. realism, artistic style, control, speed), and when to use which (e.g. quick social graphics vs fine art vs photorealistic). End with clear recommendations: which tool to pick for a complete beginner, which for pros, and which for specific use cases. Style: comparison and practical; aim for clear, actionable recommendations.
prompts.title: Choose an AI Image Tool
prompts.description: Compare Midjourney, DALL·E 3, Leonardo, Stable Diffusion. Best for beginners and pros.

prompts.prompt: Explain techniques for keeping the same character or visual style consistent across multiple AI-generated images. Cover: (1) Using reference images: how to upload and describe them. (2) Using seeds and parameters to reproduce similar looks. (3) Character sheets and written descriptions: what to specify (face, hair, clothing, style). (4) Tool-specific tips: include 2–3 concrete tips for specific tools (e.g. Midjourney, Leonardo, Stable Diffusion) such as character reference features or style presets. Format as a tutorial with step-by-step techniques and named tools so users can apply this in their workflow.
prompts.title: Consistent Characters
prompts.description: Techniques to keep the same character or style across multiple AI images.

prompts.prompt: Summarize this lecture in clear, structured notes suitable for quick review before an exam. Include: (1) Main topic and learning objectives: what the lecture was about and what students should be able to do. (2) Key points in bullet form: the main ideas in order, with sub-bullets where helpful. (3) Definitions of important terms: spell out any jargon or key concepts. (4) One short example per major concept to reinforce understanding. Keep the format scannable with clear headings. Aim for concise but complete coverage so the notes can replace re-reading the full lecture.
prompts.title: Summarize Lecture
prompts.description: Turn lecture notes into structured study notes with key points, definitions, and examples for exam review.

prompts.prompt: Summarize this book chapter for study and revision. Include: (1) Chapter title and main argument: what the author is arguing or explaining. (2) Key takeaways in numbered points: the main ideas a reader should remember. (3) Important quotes or evidence: 2–4 short quotes or facts that support the argument. (4) How this chapter connects to the rest of the book or course: themes, characters, or concepts that link to other material. Format the summary so it can be used directly for quiz or exam preparation. Make it actionable: a student should be able to answer questions from this summary.
prompts.title: Summarize Book Chapter
prompts.description: Summarize a book chapter for study and revision. Key takeaways, quotes, and links to the course for quiz or exam.

prompts.prompt: Based on this [lecture notes / book chapter / topic], generate 15 quiz questions to test understanding. Use a mix of: (1) Multiple choice: 10 questions with 4 options each and one correct answer. (2) True/false: 3 questions. (3) Short-answer: 2 questions that require a sentence or two. For each question provide: the question text, the correct answer, and a brief explanation of why that answer is correct (so the student can learn from mistakes). Format as: Question → Answer → Why. Ensure the questions cover the main concepts and are suitable for self-testing before a quiz or exam.
prompts.title: Generate Quiz Questions
prompts.description: Create multiple-choice, true/false, and short-answer quiz questions from your notes or book. Includes answers and explanations.

prompts.prompt: Create an exam study guide from this material. Include: (1) List of topics likely to appear on the exam with priority (high/medium) based on emphasis in the material. (2) Key definitions and formulas to memorize: list them clearly so they can be reviewed quickly. (3) Five to ten practice exam-style questions with model answers: mix short-answer and multiple choice. (4) Common mistakes to avoid: typical errors students make on this topic. Format the guide for quick revision the night before the exam: use headings, bullets, and clear sections. Focus on high-yield content that is most likely to appear.
prompts.title: Exam Study Guide
prompts.description: Build an exam study guide: prioritized topics, key definitions and formulas, practice questions with model answers, and common mistakes to avoid.

prompts.prompt: I have a final exam covering [list topics or paste syllabus]. Create a comprehensive final exam prep plan. Include: (1) Breakdown of topics by weight or importance: which topics are worth more and how much time to spend on each. (2) Summary of each topic in 3–5 bullet points: main ideas, definitions, and key facts. (3) Ten to fifteen final-exam-style questions: mix of short-answer and essay questions with sample or model answers. (4) A one-page cheat sheet: the most critical facts, formulas, and concepts on a single page for last-minute review. The plan should support both full review and last-minute cramming. Quality: comprehensive but usable; one-pager plus full review structure.
prompts.title: Final Exam Prep
prompts.description: Full final exam prep plan: topic breakdown, bullet summaries, exam-style questions with sample answers, and a one-page cheat sheet.

prompts.prompt: Turn this [lecture / chapter / notes] into 20 flashcards for active recall. Format each card as: Front: one clear question or term (e.g. 'What is X?' or 'Define Y'). Back: concise answer in 2–3 sentences maximum. Cover the main concepts, key definitions, and at least one example per major idea. The flashcards should be suitable for quiz and exam review: focused on what is likely to be tested. Ensure question–answer pairs are self-contained and easy to use in a flashcard app or for self-quizzing.
prompts.title: Flashcards from Notes
prompts.description: Turn lectures or chapters into flashcards for active recall. Question–answer pairs for quiz and exam review.
